title: [MTR/NTE] Trolleywire Pack
body:
# MTR Trolleybus wires and consoles.

This pack add's trolleybus wires and consoles for more realism with the trolleybuses pack for the MTR Mod.

_In future updates, We plan on maybe also adding wires._

This pack requires [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mods, and optional [MSD](https://modrinth.com/mod/station-decoration).


Ported and made by [bl_tmf](https://modrinth.com/user/bl_tmf) - RuMTR Member
